items.definition_en: A bra is a piece of clothing worn by women to cover and support the breasts.
items.example_en: She bought a new bra at the store.

items.definition_en: Boxer shorts are loose underwear worn by men.
items.example_en: He wears boxer shorts every day.

items.definition_en: Panties are underwear worn by women and girls.
items.example_en: She packed clean panties in her bag.

items.definition_en: Briefs are short, tight underwear for men or women.
items.example_en: He likes to wear briefs instead of boxers.

items.definition_en: A thong is a piece of underwear with a narrow strip at the back.
items.example_en: She prefers a thong under tight clothes.

items.definition_en: An undershirt is a light shirt worn under other clothes.
items.example_en: He put on an undershirt before his shirt.

items.definition_en: Thermal underwear is special clothing that keeps you warm.
items.example_en: In winter, she wears thermal underwear.

items.definition_en: Long johns are long underwear worn to keep warm.
items.example_en: He wore long johns while skiing.

items.definition_en: A slip is a thin dress worn under a skirt or dress.
items.example_en: She wore a slip under her dress.

items.definition_en: A camisole is a thin top for women, worn under clothes.
items.example_en: She bought a new camisole for summer.

items.definition_en: An underskirt is a skirt worn under another skirt.
items.example_en: She wore an underskirt with her dress.

items.definition_en: A vest is a piece of underwear for the top part of the body.
items.example_en: He always wears a vest under his shirt.

items.definition_en: A sports bra is a bra for support during exercise.
items.example_en: She puts on a sports bra before jogging.

items.definition_en: Underpants are underwear for the lower body.
items.example_en: He changed into clean underpants.

items.definition_en: A crop top is a short shirt that shows the stomach.
items.example_en: She wore a crop top to the party.

items.definition_en: A bodysuit is a tight one-piece garment for the body.
items.example_en: She wore a bodysuit under her jeans.

items.definition_en: A corset is a tight piece of clothing worn to shape the waist.
items.example_en: She wore a corset for the event.

items.definition_en: A nightdress is a light dress worn in bed.
items.example_en: She put on her nightdress before sleeping.

items.definition_en: Boxers are comfortable, loose men's underwear.
items.example_en: He prefers boxers to briefs.

items.definition_en: Underwear is clothing worn under your main clothes.
items.example_en: She bought new underwear last week.
